recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Animation, Adventure, TV Movie, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: When their trip to San Lorenzo takes a turn for the worst, Arnold and his classmate’s only hope of getting home is retracing the dangerous path that led to Arnold's parents' disappearance.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure, Drama, Thriller

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: "Wuthering Heights"
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

recommendations.title: Pumping Iron
recommendations.overview: Amateur and professional bodybuilders prepare for the 1975 Mr. Olympia and Mr. Universe contests as five-time champion Arnold Schwarzenegger defends his Mr. Olympia title against Serge Nubret and the shy young Lou Ferrigno.

recommendations.title: West Side Story
recommendations.overview: Two youngsters from rival New York City gangs fall in love, but tensions between their respective friends build toward tragedy.
